title: Za dvoma zaytsiamy
actors: Oleg Borisov, Margarita Krinitsyna, Nikolay Yakovchenko
plot: Madcap comedy set in early 20th century Kyiv about a barber whose fondness for drink, gambling, and women lead to bankruptcy. He marries an ugly rich woman to solve his financial woes, but pines for a virtuous beauty who despises ...
